description: EATP v3 AuditAnchor with a unicode subject; JCS sorts keys by UTF-16 code unit and emits raw UTF-8 (issue #1590).
rfc8785_reference: RFC 8785 Appendix B locale example: keys {peach, péché, pêche, sin} sort by UTF-16 code unit to [peach, péché, pêche, sin] with é/ê emitted as raw UTF-8. expected_subject_jcs is that INDEPENDENT published canonical string.
expected_subject_jcs: {"peach":"This sorting order","péché":"is wrong according to French","pêche":"but canonicalization MUST","sin":"ignore locale"}
expected_canonical_json: {"action": "envelope_created", "agent_id": "agent-conformance-001", "anchor_id": "anc-v3-unicode-001", "content_hash": "39f44e3f62d9b179814da3e2d82c7f22d3956ce337ba732f65210812cf211a49", "envelope_id": "env-001", "metadata": {"pact_action": "envelope_created", "role_address": "D1-R1"}, "previous_hash": null, "result": "success", "schema_version": "v3", "sequence": 0, "subject": {"peach": "This sorting order", "p\u00e9ch\u00e9": "is wrong according to French", "p\u00eache": "but canonicalization MUST", "sin": "ignore locale"}, "subject_hash": "sha256:d99d0ebdcb0033cb858cfa830ae46bc0fb3309413b271f1da828c89901a27ed5", "timestamp": "2026-01-15T10:30:00.000000+00:00", "verification_level": "AUTO_APPROVED"}
